full_text:
Zhang Shuang 張爽
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Shuang (張爽). Took part in pushing Liu Bei to become emperor. Zhang Shuang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
